title: senecio moqueguensis
intro: Senecio moqueguensis, also known as Peruvian groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Senecio moqueguensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Senecio moqueguensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Andean region of South America.
